source.book: 《9分达人雅思听力真题还原及解析6》

segments.text: Good morning everyone, I'm Dave, the manager of Creton running sports club.
segments.translation: 大家早上好，我是戴夫，克雷顿跑步运动俱乐部的经理。

segments.text: Today I'll tell you something about the running competition which will be held next month.
segments.translation: 今天我要给大家讲讲下个月要举办的跑步比赛。

segments.text: As we know, the annual run is one of the most popular events in our town, and it attracts young and old every year.
segments.translation: 众所周知，这场年度跑步赛是我们镇上最受欢迎的活动之一，每年都吸引着男女老少参加。

segments.text: This year we will continue the tradition, but there're some small adjustments.
segments.translation: 今年我们会延续这个传统，不过有一些小的调整。

segments.text: First about the date, the exact time of the run is still on the first Saturday of May, but we'll inform you in advance if it's to be delayed due to bad weather.
segments.translation: 首先说日期，比赛的具体时间仍然定在五月的第一个周六，但如果因天气恶劣需要延期，我们会提前通知大家。

segments.text: The run used to start at the park, which is being refurbished at the moment, so this time all the runners are expected to gather in front of the castle and start from there.
segments.translation: 以前比赛是从公园出发的，但公园目前正在翻修，所以这次所有跑者都要在城堡前集合，从那里出发。

segments.text: The actual run begins at 9 am, but the runners start arriving at about 8.45, so some of you might have to get up early that morning if you live far away.
segments.translation: 比赛正式开始时间是上午九点，但跑者们大约八点四十五就要陆续到场了，所以住得远的人那天早上可能得早点起床。

segments.text: Someone has asked how long you'll be required to run.
segments.translation: 有人问需要跑多远。

segments.text: In the past few years, the runners have had to complete the distance of five miles, but most people want to do a bit more than that, so we will lengthen it to seven miles this time.
segments.translation: 过去几年，跑者们要跑完五英里的路程，但大多数人想再多跑一点，所以这次我们把距离加长到七英里。

segments.text: Some of you might not be sure whether you can run that far, so you'd better start doing a bit of training.
segments.translation: 有些人可能不太确定自己能不能跑那么远，所以你们最好开始做点训练。

segments.text: I'm excited to tell you that this year we've got the sponsorship from a big company, who has promised to cover all the competition expenses, including the prize for the champion.
segments.translation: 我很高兴地告诉大家，今年我们拿到了一家大公司的赞助，他们承诺承担比赛的全部费用，包括给冠军的奖品。

segments.text: The runner with the shortest time will be awarded sports equipment worth about one thousand pounds.
segments.translation: 用时最短的跑者将获得价值约一千英镑的运动器材。

segments.text: Each runner will be timed from the starting point till the end.
segments.translation: 每位跑者都会从起点到终点全程计时。

segments.text: When you cross the finish line marked on the ground of the station, you'll be given a bar code, and you should take this to one of the run volunteers who will scan it.
segments.translation: 当你冲过标在车站地面上的终点线时，会拿到一个条形码，你要把它交给一位赛事志愿者，他们会帮你扫描。

segments.text: Then you can get your time on the computer immediately.
segments.translation: 然后你马上就能在电脑上看到自己的成绩。

segments.text: And the volunteers will collect all the results.
segments.translation: 志愿者会汇总所有的成绩。

segments.text: If you are interested in the run, I suggest you register as soon as possible.
segments.translation: 如果你对这次跑步赛感兴趣，我建议你尽快报名。

segments.text: The deadline is next Sunday.
segments.translation: 截止日期是下周日。

segments.text: However, I should tell you this year you can't enrol through the Internet but have to go to the town hall and give all the personal information and sign your name.
segments.translation: 不过我得提醒大家，今年不能通过网上报名，而是要亲自去市政厅，提供所有个人信息并签上你的名字。

segments.text: It doesn't cost anything to register, as I've just said, all the costs related to the competition will be paid by our sponsor.
segments.translation: 报名是免费的，就像我刚说的，比赛相关的所有费用都由我们的赞助商承担。

segments.text: As for the age limit, you have to be at least sixteen, and the top limit is now seventy, though you need to obtain a health certificate from your doctor if you're over sixty years old.
segments.translation: 至于年龄限制，你至少要满十六岁，年龄上限现在是七十岁，不过如果你超过六十岁，需要从医生那里开一张健康证明。

segments.text: If you do come and participate in the run, I definitely recommend that you should prepare an extra pair of shoes, as last year one of the runners got something wrong with his shoes during the running and had to give up halfway through the competition.
segments.translation: 如果你确实要来参加比赛，我强烈建议你准备一双备用鞋，因为去年有位跑者跑到一半鞋出了问题，结果不得不中途退赛。

segments.text: Besides, a jacket will also be advisable, so you don't catch a cold after sweating a lot during the running.
segments.translation: 另外，最好也带一件外套，这样跑步大量出汗后就不会着凉了。

segments.text: There is no need to worry about snacks or drinks, as every runner will be supplied with chocolates and bottled water.
segments.translation: 至于零食和饮料不用担心，我们会给每位跑者提供巧克力和瓶装水。

segments.text: To prepare for this annual running competition, our club is going to organise a training class for all the participants.
segments.translation: 为了备战这场年度跑步比赛，我们俱乐部准备为所有参赛者组织一个训练班。

segments.text: In the class an experienced trainer will teach you the professional steps on how to do a running competition, like warming up before running.
segments.translation: 在训练班上，一位经验丰富的教练会教你参加跑步比赛的专业步骤，比如跑前热身。

segments.text: For those who plan to do training by yourselves, there're some suggestions for you.
segments.translation: 对于打算自己训练的人，我这里也有一些建议。

segments.text: First, don't just do morning jogging with your dog.
segments.translation: 第一，别只是牵着狗晨跑。

segments.text: Remember that you're going to compete with others.
segments.translation: 记住，你是要跟别人比赛的。

segments.text: I know some people like to exercise in groups, but it's more effective to run with your friend who can be your rival and stimulate your potential.
segments.translation: 我知道有些人喜欢集体锻炼，但和一个能当你对手、激发你潜力的朋友一起跑，效果会更好。

segments.text: Then I suggest you make a record of your running time.
segments.translation: 其次，我建议你记录下自己的跑步时间。

segments.text: It can show whether you've made any progress day by day.
segments.translation: 这样能看出你每天有没有进步。

segments.text: What's more, you'd better get used to different roads and paths in the countryside or village, as you won't just be running on level ground during the competition.
segments.translation: 还有，你最好去适应乡下或村里各种不同的路面和小径，因为比赛时你可不会只在平地上跑。

segments.text: By the way, you don't have to run in all kinds of weather, as I've just said our competition is going to be held in good weather.
segments.translation: 顺便说一句，你不必在各种天气下都去跑，因为我刚说过，我们的比赛会选在天气好的时候举行。

segments.text: Well, that's all the details about the running competition.
segments.translation: 好了，这就是关于这次跑步比赛的全部内容。

segments.text: If you have any other questions, please call our club at 8345 6234.
segments.translation: 如果你还有其他问题，请拨打我们俱乐部的电话 8345 6234。

segments.text: Anyone who is interested in the run, just get started.
segments.translation: 对这次跑步赛感兴趣的人，赶紧行动起来吧。
